FAQ

Questions people ask before calling

Real answers about towing in Dubai — straight from us.

How much does car towing cost in Dubai?

Starting from AED 100 depending on distance and vehicle type. Luxury and exotic vehicles may cost slightly more due to specialist equipment. Call 0528333027 for an instant quote — we answer in 60 seconds.

Is there a 24-hour towing service in Dubai?

Yes — we operate 24/7, every day including weekends and UAE public holidays. Day or night, WhatsApp or call 0528333027 and we dispatch immediately.

Can you tow a luxury or exotic car in Dubai?

Yes. We specialise in luxury vehicle recovery. We have safely transported Porsche, Mercedes-Brabus G800, Cadillac Escalade, Land Rover Defender and other high-value vehicles using our flatbed truck — zero contact with the ground, zero damage.

How do I get my car towed in Dubai?

WhatsApp or call 0528333027. Share your location — even just a pin — and we'll dispatch the nearest truck. That's it. Call answered within 60 seconds.

Do you offer battery boosting in Dubai?

Yes — on-site battery jump-start service available 24/7 across all of Dubai. No need to tow if a boost is all you need. Call 0528333027.

Do you tow motorcycles and quad bikes?

Yes. Dedicated handling for bikes and ATVs — secured properly, no scratches. Call 0528333027 for immediate pickup across Dubai.

What is RTA passing service?

We transport your vehicle to the RTA test centre for inspection and registration renewal — so you don't have to arrange transport yourself. Available across Dubai.

Stuck right now?

Don't wait it out — message your location and we'll have a truck moving.
